name: Nevis
ai_strategy_summary: Nevis emerged from stealth in December 2025 with $40M from Sequoia, ICONIQ, and Ribbit Capital to build a unified AI operating system that completes end-to-end operational work for wealth advisors — from meeting capture to account opening to personalized client communication.
headline_metric: AI operating system for advisors overseeing $50B+ client assets at launch; $40M from Sequoia, ICONIQ, Ribbit
headline_initiative: Unified AI operating system for end-to-end wealth advisor workflows

advisor_productivity.headline: Nevis captures meeting summaries, generates pre-meeting client briefs, auto-creates follow-up tasks, and sends personalized client emails
advisor_productivity.detail: Nevis provides AI meeting summaries, pre-meeting client briefs, auto-generated follow-up tasks, unified search across advisor systems, and auto-personalized client emails — all from a single platform. Emerged from stealth December 1, 2025 with $40M from Sequoia, ICONIQ, and Ribbit Capital.
evidence: $40M total funding from Sequoia, ICONIQ Capital, Ribbit Capital
Customers overseeing $50B+ in client assets at launch
Built in stealth with $5M seed from Sequoia
advisor_productivity.jpm_implication: Nevis's backing from top-tier investors (Sequoia, ICONIQ, Ribbit) signals that unified advisor workflow AI is the highest-conviction bet in wealthtech right now. The race to become the AI operating system for wealth management is accelerating.

sources.name: Nevis — official site (AI operating system for wealth advisors)

operations_compliance.headline: AI-powered account opening and operational workflow automation for RIA practices
operations_compliance.detail: Nevis handles account opening workflows — extracting data from documents, automating onboarding steps, and reducing the manual operational burden of new account setup for advisors.
evidence: Operational work automation is core product promise
operations_compliance.jpm_implication: AI-powered account opening is a high-impact automation target. JPM's client onboarding process should be benchmarked against AI-native tools like Nevis.

sources.name: Nevis — official site (AI operating system for wealth advisors)
